title: Infinity and Mending
description: Adds ability to craft bow with mending and infinity at same time
body: # Infinity Mending Datapack Welcome to the world of enchantment mastery with the **Infinity Mending Datapack** for Minecraft! Tired of choosing between Mending and Infinity for your bows? Now you don't have to! This datapack introduces a special crafting recipe that allows you to combine both Mending and Infinity enchantments on a single bow. ## Crafting Recipe Combine the following on an anvil: - Bow (Unenchanted) - Mending Book - Infinity Book ## How to Use 1. Just drop all items on anvil Embrace the power of endless arrows and unbreakable bows! Download the **Infinity Mending Datapack** now and enhance your Minecraft experience.
